PLF Core:
Introduction to PLF
!
Executive Summary
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.

-- 1 of 4 --

Welcome to the PLF Core training. I have 3 training videos here for you in
this section.
One of the key differences between PLF and other programs out there is
that it’s proven. I’ve personally had many successes, but our community
and my clients have had success using PLF in just about every market and
niche you can imagine.
I personally spent about 8-9 years using these strategies in a completely
different niche - the stock market. In 2003 I started teaching some friends
my strategy, and quickly realized it was working for them too.
The first PLF came out in 2005, and since then we’ve built it into a
community that’s done $500 million in sales.
My first marketing education came from the old school direct marketing
world. I learned there are three important pieces in direct marketing: list,
offer, and copy.
If you got two out of three right, you’d usually be okay. Now in Product
Launch Formula, we’ve changed this around a bit.
You’re going to be building a business where you build your own list. The
offer is going to be determined by your market, and the Launch
Conversation you’ll have with them (which you’ll learn about later). And
because your launch is in a sequence, you’re able to fine-tune your copy as
you go along.
PLF comes down to using: story, sequences, and triggers. Using these
pieces in your marketing is how you’ll build your initial client list, and then
!

your larger prospect list. This will continually expand as you stack your
launches.
Down the road you can get into Evergreen and even buy traffic, but initially
a lot of it happens through word of mouth.
!
A Couple “Elephants in the Room”
1. This only works for high-priced make money products
2. This only works for gurus
First of all, PLF has been used in so many different markets: learning to
play guitar, health food, meditation, brain trauma, learning sports, and so
many others. My prototypical case study, John Gallagher, makes most of
his sales from a $10/month membership site.
And secondly, nobody starts off as a guru. They did launches and then
became known as gurus, and you can too (if you want).
The bottom line is that this is all proven and it’s going to work for you. Yes,
you’re going to learn about launches, but PLF is actually going to
restructure your business.
!
Two Things That Will Hold You Back
1. “I knew that” - don’t tune out and say I already knew that, because this
will hold you back. Don’t be “too cool for school”
!
